name: Red Bell Pepper Compound Butter
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped chives or garlic chives
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Roast the bell pepper for 20 minutes.
3. Remove the roasted bell pepper from the oven and place it in a plastic bag. Seal the bag and let cool for 10 minutes.
4. Once cooled, remove the skin from the bell pepper.
5. Chop the bell pepper into 1/4-inch dice.
6. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well until evenly incorporated.
7. Place the mixture on a sheet of plastic wrap and roll it into a cylinder shape.
8. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
9. Serve with bread or use to season cooked vegetables.
Makes 24 generous 1-tablespoon servings.
